name: Silent Beach
description: A hidden stretch of coastline with golden sand, palm trees, gentle waves, and very few visitors. One of the best places in southern Sri Lanka for reflection, solitude, sunsets, and escaping busy tourist areas. Ideal for long walks, photography, quiet thinking, and reconnecting with nature.

name: Rekawa Beach
description: A natural coastal area with quiet surroundings, ocean air, and a slow peaceful feeling. Good for people who want space away from noise.

name: Ussangoda
description: A wide open red-earth landscape near the ocean. Feels unusual, cinematic, quiet, and different from normal tourist places.

name: Galle Fort
description: A historic coastal town with cafés, ocean views, old streets, and a calm aesthetic atmosphere. Good for walking, photos, and slow evenings.

name: Cinnamon Life
description: A luxury city escape with modern architecture, refined interiors, calm seating areas, skyline views, and a premium atmosphere. Good for feeling inspired, relaxing after stress, sitting alone, or experiencing a peaceful high-end city mood.

name: Lotus Tower View Area
description: A city-view location with skyline energy, lights, and a modern Colombo atmosphere. Good for people who want city views and a reflective mood.

name: Haputale
description: A mountain town with mist, cool air, tea estates, and peaceful views. Good for people who want quiet nature and a deep reflective atmosphere.

name: Lipton's Seat
description: A famous viewpoint surrounded by tea estates and mountain scenery. Best for sunrise, fresh air, and quiet thinking.

name: Ohiya
description: A quiet mountain village with cold air, forest surroundings, and a lonely peaceful feeling. Good for escaping the busy world.

name: Sinharaja Forest
description: A rainforest area full of nature, greenery, sounds of birds, and deep peaceful energy. Good for people who want a natural reset.
